Metadata.title: Bruno Pinheiro — Senior Software Engineer
Metadata.description: Software engineer with over 10 years of experience building digital products.

HomePage.bio: I'm a software engineer with over 10 years of experience building products. Today I'm at Blue River Technology, a John Deere company in Silicon Valley. Before that, I worked at Globo (Latin America's largest media group), B3 (Brazil's stock exchange and one of the world's largest financial market infrastructure companies), a blockchain startup, and Pagaleve (one of Brazil's leading BNPL fintechs, with over 5 million app downloads and 10,000 partner stores).
HomePage.sideProjectsIntro: I also build a few projects of my own:

pinubi.description: Save places from any app and find them all on your map.

destrua.description: AI-powered landing page roasts with brutally honest feedback.

claudeOffice.description: Claude Code quotas, costs, and savings right in your terminal.
